title: NADE Congressional Testimony Index (1998-2018)
description: A markdown-table link index of NADE's congressional testimony and statements for the record from 1998 through 2018, each row pairing a date with a hearing title and a link to the testimony document (mostly .doc/.htm/.pdf files and NADE news permalinks). Subjects span disability backlogs, the 2009 ARRA, SSA administrative-cost funding, the disability determination/appeals process, SSI fraud/waste/abuse, the definition of disability, baby-boomer beneficiary readiness, CDRs, and commissioner confirmation hearings. Scraped from the official NADE site.
notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's Testimony index page (source URL preserved). Stored as a markdown table whose first two columns are empty (artifacts of the source HTML table). This is a link list, not the testimony texts; linked .doc/.htm/.pdf targets are NOT captured here. temporal_coverage spans the dated rows (1998-03-12 to 2018-07-25).
